tool_use.name: TodoWrite
tool_use.param: [{'content': 'Read dispatch_cmd.py and understand current code around line 220-241', 'stat...[truncated 561 chars]... checks'}, {'content': 'Submit PR', 'status': 'completed', 'activeForm': 'Submitting PR'}]

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan #8764 implementation complete. PR submitted: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8764
**Summary of changes:**
1. **`src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py`** (line ~222): Added an `is_branch_checked_out` check before calling `create_branch`. When the plan branch is checked out in any worktree, the `git branch -f` call is skipped. The subsequent `commit_files_to_branch` (which uses `git update-ref`) and push still run normally.
2. **`tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py`**: Added `test_dispatch_skips_create_branch_when_branch_is_checked_out` which configures `FakeGit` with a worktree entry for the plan branch, verifying that `create_branch` is NOT called while the dispatch workflow still succeeds.
